title: Document Intake and Redaction
text: Enterprise document pipelines should mask PII before indexing or sending content to a model. Email addresses and phone numbers should be redacted in logs and evaluation artifacts.

title: RAG Retrieval Quality
text: RAG systems need repeatable evaluation using recall at k, precision at k, reciprocal rank, citation support, latency, and human quality review.

title: Human Review Routing
text: Low-confidence extraction or weak retrieval should route to human review. Review queues help maintain accuracy, auditability, and responsible AI governance.

title: Agent Tool Governance
text: Agentic workflows should restrict tool access, log every tool invocation, validate payloads before external writes, and require approval for sensitive operations.
